title: Are Aliens Humans From the Future?
summary: This interview explores the hypothesis that aliens may be humans from the future, discussing contactee experiences and the prevalence of humanoid encounters. The discussion examines statistical data showing most contactees report friendly experiences with human-like beings versus more negative experiences with non-human forms.

key_claims.claim: 52% of contactees experience hominid-like creatures in their contact experience
85% of those who encounter hominid-like beings report friendly or neutral experiences
Contactees who interacted with less human forms had more negative experiences
The most commonly reported form in contact experiences is human
